text.title: Recognition Over Recall Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is the audience general users (not power-user / vim / SQL)?
Is the audit scope a clickable-prototype or live-build (not static)?

conclusion.verdict: apply: full audit including cross-screen recall category.
apply partial: skip cross-screen category and emit note; static audit covers icon-only and hidden-option only.
block: recall is intentional for power-user tools; route to power-user-shortcut methodology if exists.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, audience is general users, audit scope is clickable prototype → produce findings across all categories with severity per r8-icon-allowlist treatment.
